apply_multiple_edits_to_file: apply multiple text replacements to a single file in one atomic operation
replace_all_occurrences_in_file: replace all occurrences of a string across a file using the replace_all flag
resolve_relative_file_path: resolve a relative file path against the tool context working directory
check_edit_permission: check and request permission before applying edits to a specified file
validate_edit_parameters: validate that file_path and edits array are provided before executing multi-edit
